indicators.name: Large bathtub
indicators.rationale: A large bathtub is not conducive to sleep as it is typically associated with relaxation and bathing, not sleeping.

indicators.name: Bright window
indicators.rationale: Bright natural light from the window can be disruptive to sleep patterns.

reasoning_summary: The presence of a large bathtub and bright window makes this space less suitable for primary sleep due to associations with relaxation and potential light disturbance.
